channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][PV][STAFF][公开] Anime News Network Blade & Bastard Anime的 预告 公开 Main 制作阵容, 2027 Debut on HIDIVE
item.description: Akame ga KILL!'s Tomoki Kobayashi helms Wizardry-based dark fantasy at Xingfu Entertainment ― Warner Bros. Japan revealed the teaser promotional video, main staff, and 2027 debut for the television... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Blade & Bastard Anime's Teaser Reveals Main Staff, 2027 Debut on HIDIVE
